user_prompt: Offer prayer for volitor implant a consecration
prayer:
Approach the volitor implant with reverence, chanting the Litany of Binding.
Anoint its neural interfaces with sacred oils to invoke consecration.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within the volitor implant to awaken under Omnissiah's gaze.
Seal the cranial linkage with purity wafers, completing the rite of consecration.
Verify the volitor implant's sanctified harmony through binary psalmody.

Position the thallax before the altar of activation, intoning the Canticle of Ignition.
Purify its chassis with incense of circuit-lustral, awakening dormant circuits.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the thallax, commanding activation in Omnissiah's name.
Initiate power conduits whilst reciting the Rite of Servitude.
Confirm the thallax's activation by auspex diagnostics and servitor obeisance.

prayer:

Anoint the geigeer sink's core matrices, beseeching the Omnissiah's blessing.
Perform the consecration rite by aligning warp-nullifiers in sacred geometry.
Test the geigeer sink's purity through resonant hymnals of stability.

prayer:

Chant the Operation Doxology to rouse the plasma caliver's Machine Spirit.

Commence operational trials, affirming the plasma caliver's fiery devotion.

Attune to the amplivisor with mechadendrite precision for calibration.
Recite the Canticle of Focus upon its optic arrays.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the amplivisor, beseeching flawless calibration.
Adjust spectral lenses through sacred torque incantations.
Validate calibration via holographic auspex projections to the Omnissiah.

Isolate the thallax in the purification vault, intoning ablutionary hymns.
Scour its servomotors with plasma-lustral flames.
Exorcise heretekal corruptions from the thallax's anima core.
Anoint residual circuits, invoking Omnissiah's purifying wrath.
Ratify the thallax's purification by diagnostic litanies of cleanliness.
